interventions.name: P6 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: class-versus-instance modeling tasks that compare definitions, objects, and per-object state explicitly

interventions.name: P6 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: object-state trace tables that connect method calls to state changes across one or more components

interventions.name: P6 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: component interaction diagrams showing which object or module is responsible for each bounded behavior

interventions.name: P6 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired redesign tasks that transfer one class-and-object pattern into a second application context
